contexts.context: ...Auden manuscripts, letters, personal notes and newspaper <mark>cuttings</mark>, and now we tried to winnow the wheat...
...a letter to Die Presse protesting sharply overagainst the <mark>cuts</mark> which had been made by the producer.  But...
...at the do after 7·30. I agree about the <mark>cutting</mark>. Will keep it till you come or bring...
